ASSISTANTS.CREATE_WITH_AI_NAME_DESC: Enter the assistant name before generating with AI
ASSISTANTS.WELCOME_MESSAGE_PLACEHOLDER: Enter the welcome message for this assistant
ASSISTANTS.KNOWLEDGE_BASE_PLACEHOLDER: Enter knowledge base information for this assistant
ASSISTANTS.INSTRUCTIONS_PLACEHOLDER: Enter specific instructions for this assistant
ASSISTANTS.SYSTEM_PROMPT_PLACEHOLDER: Enter the system prompt for this assistant
ASSISTANTS.TEMPERATURE_DESCRIPTION: Controls randomness in responses (0.0 = more focused, 1.0 = more creative)
ASSISTANTS.MAX_TOKENS_DESCRIPTION: Maximum number of tokens in response
ASSISTANTS.MODEL_DESCRIPTION: AI model to use for this assistant
ASSISTANTS.DELETE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete this assistant?
